capabilities.purpose: Turn an ambiguous request into an approved Intent Contract without guessing direction.
exit_evidence: The user-owned direction is explicit enough for design or planning.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in directional interview and stop on unresolved direction.

capabilities.purpose: Resolve conflicts and missing decisions against project truth before implementation.
exit_evidence: Applicable sources have been read and material conflicts are resolved or escalated.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in authority and conflict loop.

capabilities.purpose: Expose the user-invoked grill-me alias for an explicit relentless interview.
exit_evidence: The explicit grilling session has produced user-owned decisions.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in directional interview.

capabilities.purpose: Expose the user-invoked grill-with-docs alias for clarification with durable domain documents.
exit_evidence: The user-owned decisions and requested durable documents agree.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in alignment interview and update approved truth directly.

capabilities.purpose: Create durable shared language and record consequential domain decisions.
exit_evidence: Terms and boundaries are usable by implementation and review.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in glossary and decision-record path.

capabilities.purpose: Map behavior and user experience choices to approved product outcomes.
exit_evidence: The user has approved a design direction and its acceptance evidence.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in design brief and request approval before implementation.

capabilities.purpose: Convert approved direction into small, verifiable execution slices.
exit_evidence: Every slice has scope, verification, dependencies, and applicable user gates.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in slice plan with one in-progress slice at a time.

capabilities.purpose: Implement one approved slice while preserving project constraints.
exit_evidence: The current slice is implemented without expanding direction or scope.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in minimal-change execution loop.

capabilities.purpose: Choose a host-native or Git worktree boundary before isolated feature execution.
exit_evidence: The execution workspace is isolated or a safe in-place choice is explicit.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in isolation check and stop if safe isolation is mandatory but unavailable.

capabilities.purpose: Execute an approved plan one bounded and reviewed slice at a time.
exit_evidence: The slice passes its declared checks and the next action is explicit.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in one-slice execution loop.

capabilities.purpose: Prove behavior through an observed red-green-refactor cycle.
exit_evidence: The failure was observed before implementation and the focused test is now green.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in red-green-refactor discipline.

capabilities.purpose: Delegate independent tasks without leaking shared state or bypassing review between results.
exit_evidence: Each delegated result is reviewed and integrated against the approved slice.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in sequential execution path.

capabilities.purpose: Diagnose unexpected behavior before proposing a correction.
exit_evidence: The root cause is supported by reproduction and discriminating evidence.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in reproduce-isolate-hypothesize-verify loop.

capabilities.purpose: Lock visual intent, information hierarchy, interaction states, and a golden reference.
exit_evidence: One representative visual direction or golden screen is approved.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in UI Intent Contract and require visual approval.

capabilities.purpose: Implement approved UI intent with responsive and accessible behavior.
exit_evidence: Required states work at declared viewports and accessibility checks pass.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in UI implementation checklist.

capabilities.purpose: Verify real rendered behavior and compare it with the golden reference.
exit_evidence: Functional and visual verdicts are recorded separately with current captures.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in render-capture-compare loop.

capabilities.purpose: Inspect trust boundaries, permissions, secrets, and destructive operations.
exit_evidence: Critical trust-boundary risks are resolved or explicitly accepted by the user.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in high-risk checklist and stop on unreviewed critical risk.

capabilities.purpose: Review correctness, regressions, contracts, and maintainability against project truth.
exit_evidence: Findings are prioritized and blocking issues are resolved or declared.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in evidence-first review checklist.

capabilities.purpose: Evaluate review feedback technically before accepting or implementing it.
exit_evidence: Every accepted suggestion is technically verified and every rejection is evidence-based.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in verify-before-accepting review loop.

capabilities.purpose: Create or revise an Agent Skill with trigger, resource, and forward-verification discipline.
exit_evidence: The Skill validates and its target behaviors have been exercised without hidden context.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in Skill authoring and validation checklist.

capabilities.purpose: Require fresh evidence before any completion or correctness claim.
exit_evidence: Fresh verification output supports every material completion claim.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in evidence-before-claims gate.

capabilities.purpose: Prove release readiness and obtain confirmation before external publication.
exit_evidence: The release candidate is verified and the user has confirmed external publication.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in release gate and require explicit confirmation.

capabilities.purpose: Present explicit integration, publication, and cleanup choices for completed work.
exit_evidence: The chosen integration path is complete and publication gates were respected.
capabilities.fallback: Use the built-in branch finish and publication gate.
